_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.6 the full MonsterScaling raid stat-scaling chain (scaling/MonsterScaling: CoX/ToB/ToA/Vardorvis/phases + defence reductions) and the PlayerVsNpcCalc.spec path (getSpecCalc/getSpecCost/isSpecSupported/getSpecDps + the sanitizeInputs spec-stance reset) are ported, completing the calc. Scaling rows (exercises 'scaling/MonsterScaling') assert the SCALED maxHit/accuracy/dps; spec rows (spec:true, exercises 'PlayerVsNpcCalc.spec') assert specMaxHit (integer exact) and specAccuracy/specDps (relative <= 1e-9) via getSpecCalc()/getSpecDps(). The kind:"nvp" rows (NpcVsPlayerCalc.dps) and kind:"pvn" rows are unchanged.
